title: The Death of Marw3n
description: According to Al-Harith- Ibn Sa°d-Muhammad b. °UmarMusa b. Yacqub-Abu al-Huwayrith: When death came to Muc3wiyah b. Yazld Abu Layla, he refused to appoint anyone as caliph after him. Hassan b. Bahdal desired that the authority after Mucawiyah b. Yazid should be made over to the latter's 549. For the following account, cf. Ansdb, V, 149-50. 550. See above, p. 64. 551. For what follows, cf. Ansdb, V, 159-60.

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 20
